title: Fonts
description: Each array of fonts creates a priority-based order. The first font in the array should be the ideal font, followed by sensible, web-safe fallbacks

items.name: Base
items.description: System fonts for body copy and globally set text.
items.value: system-ui, Segoe UI, Roboto, Oxygen-Sans, Ubuntu, Cantarell, Helvetica Neue, sans-serif

items.name: Medium
items.value: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, Roboto, Oxygen-Sans, Ubuntu, Cantarell, Helvetica Neue,sans-serif
